# Fuel Map — base64 tarball via VNC (fallback)

**Source:** `fuel-map-deploy.tgz` (~2.2 MB) → **74** base64 lines (~40 KB each).
**Time:** ~30–45 min of pasting; use GitHub path in `VNC-10MIN-PATH.md` if possible.

## On VPS (once)

```bash
mkdir -p /tmp/fuel-map-b64
cd /tmp/fuel-map-b64
# For each chunk N below: nano chunkNNN.b64 → paste ONE line → save
cat chunk*.b64 | tr -d '\n\r ' | base64 -d > /opt/fuel-map-deploy.tgz
ls -la /opt/fuel-map-deploy.tgz
mkdir -p /opt && cd /opt && tar -xzf /opt/fuel-map-deploy.tgz
```

Windows: open `deploy/vnc-chunks/chunkNNN.b64.txt` in Notepad, Ctrl+A, paste into VNC `nano`.

## Paste blocks (single line each, no line breaks inside block)

### Chunk 001 → save as `chunk001.b64`

```text

```

```text

```
